content.text: As mentioned in Aurix - Standby Power domain - XC-CI China - Docupedia (bosch.com) , we will use Topology of Type 2 (Where VEXT will be turned OFF)
Below are the possible Wakeup sources that can move the Tricore to Normal Mode from Standby Mode

items: Main VEXT supply ramps-up again if configured via PMSWCR0.PWRWKEN enable bit
Wake-up is triggered by Standby Controller if configured via PMSWCR0.SCRWKEN enable bit
Wake-up via Wake-up Timer if configured via PMSWCR0.WUTWKEN enable bit
Wake-up via Pin B (Pin 33.12) if configured via PMSWCR0.PINBWKEN enable bit

content.text: We need to enable Aurix Wakeup by SCR and during Power on Reset So, below bit has to be set before entering to SCR standby mode

items: Enable PMSWCR0.PWRWKEN → Tricore wakeup on Power on Reset
Enable PMSWCR0.SCRWKEN → Tricore wakeup by SCR
